calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-216: E1 predictive wanting schema readout validation
items.notes: 2-condition ablation (WITH_SCHEMA vs WITHOUT_SCHEMA) x 3 seeds. Tests schema readout head learning + wanting landscape coverage. C1: salience>0.1, C2: wanting coverage higher, C3: resource rate lift 2/3.
